creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
Hello.

I'm running SMPLayer on FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT,that works good,but on the terminal I see a cyclic error : (I'm using lxde)

[root@marietto /mnt/da3p2/Backups]==> SMPlayer version 23.12.0 (revision 10207) ruunning on FreeBSD
QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory

SMPlayer version 23.12.0 (revision 10207) running on FreeBSD
QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory

how to fix it ?
